body_txt: You did not read this entry. It was never written. Check the security camera footage; it shows you were alone the whole time. You never got here, you dreamed it or were too tired/high/medicated and started to hallucinate. This phrase is not associated with The Men in Black , and No Such Agency would ever use it. There are no large number of variants. You don't need to compare with You Didn't See That . P.S. That Didn't Happen .
